purpose: Rename and/or re-index an existing binder folder. The remediation path for wrong folder names (e.g. the double-index bug).
transport: XMLHttpRequest (fetch fails CORS preflight; works from KC tab)

body_template.oldLocationId: {locationId of the folder being renamed — THE load-bearing field}
body_template.engagementId: {clientId}  // misnamed — value is the Axcess clientId, not engagementId

response: empty body on 200 — verify via follow-up folder_get
gotchas: Field must be oldLocationId. Using locationId returns 400 'Error Updating Folder. Parent not found.'
PUT/PATCH on /v1/NewEngagementView/folder/{locationId} return 405; PUT /v1/Documents/{clientId}/{locId} returns 500 (folders are not Documents).
folderName must NOT embed the index prefix — the binder UI renders folderIndex and folderName separately ('01 | 01 Front of File' double-index bug).
captured: 2026-06-03 — Properties-dialog monkeypatch, Coop playground binder; 24 folders batch-renamed at 200 from KC tab
